reviews.review_text: Loved it xx
Great little caravan park with immaculate  amenities and lots of activities for kids. Local pub is pretty good too!

Close to the Stupa of Great Compassion & close to Bendigo, in a beautiful, peaceful place in between.
The room was very clean and well maintained, everything works. The shower was hot quickly, so comfortable and roomy.
Staff were friendly and helpful.
We will be back.
Big 4 Bendigo Marong Holiday Park is a great and friendly park for a stop over very clean amenities,great drive threw sites always a pleasure to stay there
Great park staff amenities no issues will stay again great drive through sites
It was pur second visit and we love the park. The facilities are excellent,  the staff are wonderful and the sites are great. We will be back.
Great little park and fantastic customer service. We had a powered grass site. Nice and level. Great amenities. Really enjoyed our stay here and will definitely be back.

We arrived here without a booking and found the most helpful and accommodating staff member that I have ever come across. Mel quickly sorted us out and helped find a place for our JetSki and extra car as well ( lucky it was a Sunday ) . This park is spotless and has incredible amenities. The pool and spa area is amazing and its close proximity to the pub made for a pleasant walk to an excellent meal.  All staff we encountered were so friendly and happy. |An excellent stay that I can’t fault. We will definitely return. Thank you !

What a great Park, only 12 mins out of Bendigo.
Sites are easy to manoeuvre into.
Grass is very lush.
Facilities are everything you need.
Stayed 2 nights and everyone we talked to were enjoying their stay.
Dog friendly (we don’t have a dog) but they seemed they would be very looked after.
The Team were ultra friendly and looked after us well.
We know how hard they work as we own a Park as well.
Awesome job, awesome park….we will be back
Michael & Mandy

Girlfriend and I pulled in with our little vans, for a few days away. Our main goal was to see the Big Stupa which was only a few kms away. Our sites were easily accessible. Staff were friendly and helpful. And the park itself is clean, tidy and very pretty as there are many trees providing shade for the sites.

What an amazing place to stay we came here for the soccer tournament the place is just so neatly kept. The cabins are nice decent size for a family of 6 and clean. There was variety of things for the kids to keep themselves occupied from younger to older kids.

The staff are so lovely and friends every morning you would see the little buggy go round to make sure the place was tidy.

Will definitely be coming back here when we come back to Bendigo.
Concrete van sites are excellent. Park is on the Calder Highway so lots of trucks at night. Ask for a site away from main road. Amenities & service are good.
New & clean rooms very small only one car parking/no space for trailer or 2nd car
Stayed on a powered site with friends who stayed in a cabin. Was a really nice and spacious sites with excellent facilities!

Our site 23 was easy to reverse into. The concrete pad was perfect, and lovely grass on the rest of the site, which was maintained well. It was quiet and protected from noise and other campers.
The Amenities were kept wonderfully clean and even had paper towels.  To my surprise,  the air conditioning was on, and it was heating the facilities
in the early morning.
The camp kitchen was excellent and I made some great sourdough items in  it.
The pool looked inviting, but we did not use it.
There is an off leash area for pets, but sadly I never noticed until we were packing up.

Fantastic weekend away! Staff were friendly and knowledgeable, all amenities were clean, so many activities for the kids, dogs are allowed to stay so made lots of puppy friends too! Will definitely be back!

Fantastic Caravan Park with great amenities. 🌟🏕️ The staff are some of the best i have seen at a caravan park? They make you feel welcome, they go above and then some, so friendly. 😊👍 I highly recommend this park! ✨💯

Originally booked a week, ended up staying two!
Grounds and amenities very well kept.
Great sized camp kitchen and all the staff were super friendly and helpful! Really loved our stay there, best park we stayed at since we left Queensland!
Big grassy sites, most with concrete pads under the awning, and pet friendly
12/10 for service and value
Thanks Big4 Marong team, well done!

We had a fantastic stay at the Marong Big4 as a big family group. The staff were very helpful and friendly and there were lots of great things to do. Our group loved the pedal bikes, the golf simulator, swimming pool and pool table. The park was very well maintained and had everything that you needed. Our sites had beautiful established trees that gave us plenty of shade in the heat. Great place to stay.
Stayed 3 nights in our caravan. Wonderful staff very clean comfortable park. Will definitely be back.

What a great Park!
It was nice to stay in a park that was quiet and outside of the hustle and bustle or the CBD of Bendigo. It's only a 15min drive if you wanted to go right into town or to Kangaroo Flat for Woolies. IGA about 7 mins down the road is good as well.
The staff are amazing and the facilities are great. Would highly recommend and will definitely be returning in the future.
One of the best Big4 I have stayed in. Great facilities open till late for the kids. Plenty to do. Sites are quiet small but otherwise a great park.
Great quite place for a caravan or camping, staff are vrry friendly and knowledgable.
A clean well run place. Very children friendly. Would stay again.
This place was full of families catching up when we got here. Place is tidy,camp kitchen is good and staff are friendly.
Spot on,   we love this place.

Great family Park
Facilities clean always
Staff friendly
Great park for kids
Great park. Just had a powered site but facilities were great
The staff were extremely friendly and helpful, finding us a suitable powered site for our caravan when they were very full. The facilities and amenities are excellent. Highly recommended.
Stayed in a powered caravan site (concrete) Amenities are spotless . Great pub and bakery within very close proximity. Credit to all staff on park maintenance and improvements.
A Great park we loved our stay very clean and tidy with friendly staff

Lovely staff, good facilities, felt safe for kids to explore without closely watching them.
Location was not good - right next to the highway (constant loud trucks all night) and miles out of Bendigo (15 minutes drive)
Super clean and perfect spa

First time sleep in a tent and it is luxury one. Hahaha.....

Apart from tent, there is cabin too. And this place also got place for caravan and RV.

Great for weekend run away.
We visited friends staying here. Very neat and tidy. Large camp sites for vans. Ensuites are clean and spacious. Impressive.

What a wonderful place. Beautifully maintained, the cleanest amenities we have seen. Extra touches, heating in the amenities and the radio playing. Most caravan sites have a concrete drive. Will definitely be back. Staff are very friendly and helpful.

So many things to do in the park for all ages. So happy with our choice to stay.
Couldn't suggest this big4 park more
A good clean place to stay
The staff here are amazing. We loved it that much, we stayed an extra night.

I stayed in a dog-friendly cabin - the cabin itself is very clean, with a fenced area on the deck so the dogs can lay out there and watch the world go by.  The new addition of the fenced, grassed area for each dog-friendly cabin is wonderful!

The park facilities are excellent and the service is fantastic.  Thank you for having us - we will be back!

Courteous and friendly check in.
Very clean and tidy facilities and grounds.
Well appointed camp kitchen.
Highly recommended.

We stayed in the dog friendly cabin when we arrived late in the day our heater was going and the cabin beautifully warm. The cabin was clean and all staff helpful and friendly it was very quiet too. Would definitely recommend
Great caravan park. Very clean and staff great to deal with. Easy access and drive through sites available. Highly recommended.
Very comfortable room sizes and the xgolf machine was a good activity to do as well
Something for everyone. I wish I could give them 6 stars, just like last time!
Beautiful intimate park with a really nice atmosphere. Really well kept. Friendly service.
The place was clean and very kid friendly had lots for kids and adults to do . Walking distance to the pub and general store

I decided on a last minute trip to Bendigo with my 2 very young children. The cabin was absolutely perfect, it was well equipped and spotlessly clean. The staff are really lovely and welcoming which made us feel welcomed and safe. All in all, we absolutely loved our stay and we will return no doubt when we can.
Would highly recommend this park. Clean tidy amenities very clean and warm. Its lovely to see how much pride they take in their park

This park exceeded our expectations. It was a 1 night unscheduled stop on our way to Mildura. Spoke with Kerry at reception who was simply wonderful very helpful and super friendly. We were given a concrete drive through site. It was nice and quiet although cold at night. The amenities are very modern and very clean and heated. Bonus. The camp kitchen was partially enclosed and very well equipped. We were so impressed that we had Kerry sign us up as Big 4 members, highly recommended and we will be back.

We had our own room on wheels
Great park very clean and very well laid out
A great place to stay. Heated bathrooms. Well equipped camp kitchen and a fire pit (our favourite). Will definitely come back.
We have just spent 2 nights at this lovely Caravan Park just outside Bendigo. The park is very clean and tidy and very quiet. We will certainly return if we come up this way again 😀

Really impressed with the park. Owners were delightful. Great facilities for the kids; jumping pillow, soccer net, basketball, flying fox, small pump track, chess set, games room, and swimming pool. Large sites and the cleanest kitchen I have seen at a caravan park. We will be back!

We hired a caravan site at Big4 Marong, the park was clean and tidy with lots of beautiful trees and grass areas. Lots of facilities to suit everyone. The communal area/kitchen was very clean and very well set up. Amenities were always clean, and a radio playing in the ladies was a nice touch. Staff are friendly and helpful. We loved our stay and will be back. We highly recommend it. Well Done😊

We stayed at the Big4 Bendigo Marong Holiday Park with our caravan for five nights and were very impressed with the cleanliness and overall facilities. Great location. And the complimentary wifi was excellent, we were able to stream shows on Netflix with no problems. Would highly recommend!

We really enjoyed our stay at BIG4 Marong Holiday Park.
The Safari Tent was much cleaner and more comfortable than we expected. After a long day, it was nice to relax in the heated spa. At first we found the water a bit cold and were not quite sure how to adjust the temperature quickly. Just when it finally started to feel warm enough, the next group of guests arrived for their booking, which was a little awkward but also quite funny.
The park is very family-friendly. The kids had a great time playing on the jumping pillow, flying fox, pump track, and also enjoyed basketball, soccer, and pedal go-karts.
The staff were extremely friendly and helpful. When our EV charging cable did not fit, they kindly provided us with a compatible one.
The location is about a 15-minute drive from Bendigo town centre. Compared to the other two BIG4 parks in Bendigo, this one is a bit further out. However, since we have already visited Bendigo several times, we mainly chose this trip to explore the campsite itself, so the distance was not a big issue for us.
If I had to mention one small downside, the Wi-Fi was a bit slow and watching YouTube on the TV was a little laggy.
Overall, it was a very pleasant experience and we would definitely come back.

Loved this park, great caravan drive thru site. Plenty of green grass. Dog field out the back.

Nice small park, kids could ride around safely

Stayed on a powered site. The park was beautifully maintained by the very friendly staff. Highly recommended for anybody wanting a quiet stay within easy distance of everything you need for a great holiday.

We had such a lovely stay; I'd give this park 10 stars if I could! The staff were extremely friendly and helpful, the bathrooms and kitchen were always clean, and the family bathroom made life so much easier with a little one. My kids loved the play areas, and my husband enjoyed a nice golf session. I highly recommend this campsite and would definitely return. Thank you again to the staff for being so helpful and always having a friendly smile.

Nice park. Well looked after with all the amenities. Pool was good. Our grass site was a bit too narrow for our van. When the awning was raised it was extremely close to our neighbour. Other sites were wider
Great Park with awesome facilities. Everything here is maintained beautifully including super clean toilets/showers
great family park lots of activities and space very clean
Nice as parks go
We had great service from  the staff. Sara explained things fantastic,  let me know exactly how x golf worked , Very impressive thankyou
Thumbs up to all the staff , absolutely beautiful park so well maintained and clean, very good price that is why it was nearly full, will definitely come back again next time longer
Amazing park staff lovely very rest full neat and very clean
Very friendly and helpful staff, facilities very clean. We had an amazing time!

Loved staying at the Big 4 Marong Caravan Park. The staff were very friendly, the park was clean, tidy, well maintained and our site was a premium concrete pad site which was beautifully situated under trees. Dog friendly, large paddock next door to take your dog for a run, dog wash on site and the facilities were excellent with the shower block and toilets always clean and smelling nice. The camp kitchen area was very good and they also had a fire pit with lots of wood when the weather gets cooler. Also going for a swim in the pool was very refreshing. Wonderful kids play area too.
Wonderful stay! We had great service and enjoyed the spa! The kitchen is clean, well stocked, and part of a great pavilion!

Beautiful little tourist park with very well maintained grounds and good facilities. Heating and cooling in toilets and showers is a much appreciated added bonus. Staff are very welcoming, friendly, and most helpful. I have stayed here several times now and always look forward to returning.
Beaut cabin that is really truly dog friendly. Loved being able to sit on the deck with our dog & not have her on the lead as it is gated & she couldn’t get out

Thankyou Recee for exceptional service and friendly smile. He is always there to help. I have told my friends about our camping experience at this BIG4. Thank you to all the staff, you have a wonderful park.
Great staff, very helpful, very clean inside & our...

Great place for a family holiday!
Our son loved the pool and go carts, the staff were lovely and very understanding when my son turned up 9am for the go carts every morning!
Great location as well, quick drive to Bendigo cbd and the amazing food there.
Everything and everyone was amazing especially Kerry lovely lady amazing service thank you to all will be back again

We just love this place for camping. The staff are friendly, the grounds and facilities are neat and tidy, it really has everything you need. It close but far enough away from the city life that you feel as though you are in the countryside. Best of all, the kids love it too! Thanks everyone for making our stay so pleasant.

Lovely small caravan park.
Amenities were clean and spacious.  Hot water pressure good.  Down side they didn't have hand held shower nozzle.  Washing the kids hair meant I got as wet as she did.  Hand heads make it easier.
Camp kitchen well stocked with microwave stove oven toasty maker etc.. coffee machine $2.00 a cup.
Lovely fire pit unfortunately it was fire ban season so wasn't lit.
Playgrounds X 2 had the kid kept busy for hours.  Pool looked amazing and many people used it. We didn't as we forgot to bring swimwear.  Lovely grounds mix of manicured lawn and native bush.  Loved the herb plot and the Rosemary bush.
I love that they are pet friendly and have multiple doggy poo bag dispensers.  Came in handy on the midnight pee and poop where I forgot our poo bag. The coin operated dog wash was also fabulous.  Dog didn't think so but once he was dry he was very happy to be clean.  Instructions could be better.  I couldn't work out if it was necessary to rinse off the flea and tick solution or not.  I did because I'm concious that our dog has sensitive skin.
Only downside to our trip and stay here was the park guests who used the area between our awning and the cabin next door as a shortcut to the amenities and the dog would bark at random people.  I got told off for asking people to not walk thru oursite as it was not a public walkway.  The dog was getting cranky at us telling him off for barking or rushing up towards them and meant we had to shorten his tether so he couldn't go beyone the awning, which meant he couldnt just walk off the mat to pee.  We ended up parking our vehicle at an angle to obstruct people walking through. Didn't stop 2 kids from entering our awning to get round the car.
People need to be very aware of where is a walkway and where is a paid for site.  I really wanted to avoid him rushing and someone falling over as they suddenly get barked at and they jump to the side.  What if the jumped and fell onto the ropes for the awning and got hurt.  Dog sounds very big and vicious bit I doubt he would bite unless provoked but I never wanted that to occur.  We did discuss on Se eral times with reception.
Such an amazing little caravan park. Fantastic drive through site. So clean and great ammenities.
Best holiday park we got the superior cabin came with 2 TVs 1 with Foxtel
Great quiet park with amazing amenities, park was spotless with friendly staff. Plenty to do for the kids.
The owners are so helpful and friendly. So many great things for the kids to do. The pool area is lovely..with lounges and hammocks. The shared facilities are clean and updated. Highly recommended.
Awesome Cabin/Studio room, new clean comfortable, smart tv/internet. Good location, although out of Bendigo it's within a short walk of 3 good meal options, General Store, Bakery and Pub.
Gr8 premium grassed sites, such a lovely park, very clean and tidy.
This was an amazing stay with the work boys great staff great facility the x golf was an amazing extra for the afternoon fun will be back 100%
Great place to stay, kids and adults loved it. Thanks heaps to Rhys and co for the hospitality!

I commend   all staff at this   beautiful  park    best customer service . Staff are very friendly
and happy       very clean amenities  great cabins& caravan sites   I  would stay  here again

We got a premium grass camp site and used shared facilities. The kitchen was well equipped and clean. It was a very hot day and we spent a couple of hours in the recreation room, that was a relief for the heat. Even the bathroom was temperature controlled. Kids enjoyed a lot, and overall, it was a great stay and experience.

We stayed for a night in a cabin. The cabin was exceptionally good and well equipped with everything you needed.
Wow, what a park, it was excellent in every way. Located on the edge of Bendigo it is a quiet location despite its proximity to the main road. It was clean and tidy with every facility you could wish for, and even has EV chargers!
We would certainly stay here again and would recommend it for anyone, particularly caravaners who could stay here before the final 2 hour trip into Melbourne. Also can avoid travelling into central Bendigo if you don't need to on your trip.
Well done, what a wonderful park.

We stayed on a drive thru caravan site and we had a very relaxing, quiet stay. The staff were exceptional … very friendly, helpful and made our stay excellent.
We stayed here way back in 2018 and hence noted the great changes that have been made to the park and its layout, services, etc. etc are fantastic… we thank all the staff for a wonderful few days of relaxed time.

Stayed here in our van and absolutely loved it. Quiet, clean and the staff are fantastic. Plenty to do for all the family. The golf simulation was a lot of fun. Great meals at the pub within walking distance.
Highly recommend.
very nice and clean camping place!

Very clean & well-maintained park. Staff great.
Stayed in a dog friendly cabin - perfect for dogs, with a fenced & gated deck. Water bowl supplied, but I always bring one. Large off-leash area behind park, but need to watch for snakes at this time of year.
Close to highway, but noise not a problem.
Normal rate for my cabin is $140/night, but I placed a successful bid on Travel Auctions, & added an extra night.
Recommend this park... 😊
Very friendly easy going managers and staff.Very clean and tidy park and surrounds.Very very clean cabins and facilities.Would recommend this park to anyone.
Extremely well presented and clean facilities. Lovely staff and always friendly.  I have been to many caravan parks in my travels and this one is by far one of the best.
Beautifully maintained grounds, lots of facilities, clean cabin where everything works. My dogs are welcome which is very important to me. Staff very helpful and friendly. I love staying here!
All ways helpful on short notice .bookings . Nice clean park it's just a great place to stay and friendly service  great job guys i will be back again.

We stayed this last weekend, the park is super well maintained with lots of amenities.
We had a powered site, a drive through which was super handy and well located within the park.
There are lots for the kids to do, pump track, jumping pillow, lawn games, playground, spa, swimming pool, pedal bikes for hire & a games room.
We were super impressed with the camp kitchen it's really well fitted out and has everything you could need for your stay!

BIG4 Bendigo Marong, is a great place to spend weekends with family and friends. The Caravan Park is safe and secure for kids and has plenty of activities to keep them occupied. Common amenities are well maintained and neat, the staff are very friendly and supportive. We had a good experience camping on one of their powered grass sites and I would highly recommend it for beginners who want to explore camping options.
Great family friendly park, neat and tidy facilities, really friendly staff.
Great caravan park, clean comfortable cabin, good value
2nd time visiting to use the X Golf simulator. Lovely staff and room, will be visiting again for sure

Came for 2 days and stayed 9 because the park was so wonderful. Staff are incredibly beautiful and helpful and the facilities are amazing. The grounds are clean and the van sites are great sizes and all easy to get into. Thank you for being so accommodating to all our needs. We will definitely be back for sure.
Staff were extremely helpful and pleasant 😊 to deal with.  We walked to the pub for a sensational dinner.  This spot is on highway so could be a bit noisy but convenient for an overnight stay

On our way home from our road trip we stopped for two nights in an ensuite site. This is easily the best caravan park we have stayed in. The staff were friendly and welcoming throughout our stay, the park was clean and amenities were amazing. Everything was supplied in the camp kitchen and the warm spa was exactly the relax we need before our long drive home. There was even a giant chess set, pool table and tennis table to enjoy in some down time.

Wonderful small caravan park with a neat range of cabins, excellent caravan sites including ensuite & drivethrough. Great internal roads and kerbing. Upgraded ablutions. Neat clean camp kitchen & eating area. Pool playground and jumping pillow for the children. The entire place is kept pristine. Lovely friendly knowledgeable staff. More improvements are on the way. Best place to stay for Bendigo and surrounds.
Always happy to come back to this lovely CP. Helpful, friendly staff and clean, tidy park and amenities

My family had a great time at Big4 Marong. The staff are friendly and helpful. My kids felt welcome and loved the freedom to roam the park. The glamping tent is a wonderful setup. I have chronicle fatigue and this allowed me to give my kids a chance to feel like they were camping. The shower was the best part of the cabin. Absolute luxury and just made me enjoy the trip even more. We loved being able to use the communal fire pit. Thank you so much for a great stay.
Nice and quiet location, professional and friendly staff, well equipped park. Two nights are not enough. Waiting to come back and stay more. Highly recommended for families.

We were very impressed with this caravan park, even though we didn't use many of the facilities, being mid winter.
The pool and play areas looked great and clean, and the park is well set out with plenty of room for each site.
We particularly liked the fact that the bathrooms had a split system heating unit operating in them.  Very welcome with a -1 degree morning!  And they also had music playing in them too.
The camp kitchen was well stocked with lots of kitchen appliances and utensils.
Even having a free standing $2 coffee machine available was a nice touch.

We spent a few days here over the school holidays and it was fantastic! So many fun activities for the kids, the cabins are fully stocked with all the bits and pieces you need to self-cater, and the reception staff are truly exceptional. We can't wait to come back again!
Great clean caravan park. Not to big and extremely well maintained. Staff friendly and helpful

The staff are friendly and helpful.
Grounds are kept clean and tidy.
Amenities are clean and tidy and cleaned regularly by experienced staff that take pride in their work which shows.
Bathroom is heated during the winter which is the best thing since sliced bread. ( the small things in life )
A great caravan park with excellent super clean facilities and great customer service.
Nice location.  Easy to find. Customer service fantastic.  Looking forward to returning there again
Pulled in for the night in MH and was greeted with warmth and awesome service. The facilities were second to none.

The owner rude to children and adults. It's apparently dog friendly, however the owner comes to scream at your dog to tell you to shut it up. I'm not sure how they received an award. The hot tub is not cleaned properly. We stayed twice (stupidly) and both times my children got hot tub folliculitis. Toilets and showers definitely need to be cleaned more regularly during peak periods.
Very pretty park with friendly helpful staff

The whole place including rooms are well maintained & clean, service is great, location perfect & has everything we need to keep our kids entertained & great that we can bring our fury little family as it's pet friendly
Overall an excellent experience with helpful staff and clean amenities. Caravan site was excellent for our needs

Great clean and tidy park. Exceptional staff service, friendly and very helpful. Amenities block fully heated and very clean stayed here in May 2024 for a couple of weeks.  Would recommend this park without hesitation.

Me and my 4 children stayed with our dog wagz, this was paradise for our family and to be able to have our furbaby with us was a bonus. All the staff were welcoming, friendly, and very helpful. The beds were comfy. Cabins where clean and secure. Pool was amazing and the spa was so relaxing! Thank you so much for your hospitality. Xx
We had a lovely stay in Marong Bendigo caravan park.  Very tidy , lovely staff. We had a very quite site which I ask for. Thank you again. We will be back

Very nice van park just out of Bendigo.
Great facilities. Loved the heated amenities block on a very cold winter’s day.

We returned to BIG4 Marong after a 2 year absence and stayed this time in a pet-friendly budget cabin. We were not disappointed. This is one of the top-tier caravan/holiday parks in which we have stayed, anywhere in Australia. Close to Bendigo, an excellent pub/diner 5 minutes away and a beautifully laid-out park. And the budget cabin was great! Strongly recommended.

I recently had the pleasure of staying at this caravan park for 4 nights with my extended family, 2 children and dog. I have done a trip up the East Coast of Australia and this is up there with one of the best caravan parks I have ever stayed at, particularly as a mother of 2! The sites are lovely and well sized. There is plenty of shady and sunny sites to choose from. There are so many small touches that make this caravan park amazing. Some memorable ones are:
- Split systems in the bathrooms
- Balls and sporting equipment for kids to use including totem tennis
- Single, double and quad bikes for hire
- They put on a fire in the communal fire pit on weekends and provide marshmallow toasting forks
- Heaters and a TV in the enclosed camp kitchen area
- A recreation room with beanbags, books, TV, coloring in things, boardgames, fridges, and a keyboard piano!
- Table tennis and pool

We will absolutely be back to stay many more times. For anyone with kids, I HIGHLY recommend this park. Well done on providing such an awesome park.

Great drive thru spacious concrete powered sites close to amenities which were clean with added touches such as music and warm air in the toilet/shower blocks.  Staff were friendly and helpful when booking over the phone and reception stocked with some necessities.  Sites were partially shaded by trees and grounds well maintained.  Reasonable walk to local pub and general store.  Highly recommend this caravan park.
Very nice place to stay. Excellent facilities and staff.

From our travels for the past 10 months from Tamworth NSW to Cooktown Qld and back down this van park is one of, if not the best we have stayed in.   Despite being quite small, it has everything you need, and then some.  The planned layout with all sites around one road is amazing.  The roads are in perfect condition, the amenities were always clean and the pool area and spa is lovely.  The staff were constantly on the move, watering, mowing, cleaning.  An awesome park which we will recommend to everyone.

One of the best parks we’ve stayed in. Spacious van sites, great amenities including pool, kids playground etc. spotless throughout and very friendly and helpful staff. Highly recommend if you’re travelling in the Bendigo area.

Having stayed in our caravan I can't comment about the rooms  but if all the other facilities are anything to go by, I can only imagine they would be excellent.  The staff are very friendly and nothing is too much trouble if you need help with anything.  We always stay there on our travels.
Very impressive park. Clean amenities and lots of activities for the kids. Very clean pool.
Great park.

perfect little place to stay - staff at check in over the phone were amazing and very accommodating. Cabin we had was modern, well cared for and a great little set up. it had everything we needed for a last minute get away that came at short notice. Short stroll to the local Pub - excellent meals and just a few km's drive to Bendigo so we could visit family. Park had a great vibe about it with plenty to do for everyone at any age. Luscious grassed sites for vans and great facilities, from fire pit to camp kitchen to little helpful tips posted about the place. Highly recommend staying here if you can.

Definitely the best caravan park l have stayed in up to date , facilities are up modern and always kept spotless , staff are friendly , can't do enough for you , sites are spacious and easily accessible , recommend this park 100%

10/10 recommend!

So much to keep the kids occupied and the grown ups relaxed.

Wow what a magnificent holiday park, l would highly recommend coming for a holiday. Excellent customer service always, all the  friendly staff that are so helpful & friendly. A big shout out to the office staff that are the best. Will definitely be returning soon.

By far one of our favourite Big 4 parks to stay at. Great sized  site for our van, beautifully kept park and super clean facilities. Kids all have a ball and plenty of activities to keep them occupied. Looking forward to our next visit already.
Excellent place to stay, rooms were clean and staff were very friendly . Play area was good, kid enjoyed it. Few kms away from Bendigo CBD but was not an issue for us.
Beautiful park staff were very friendly & the sites well grassed & good size. Will definitely stay there again.

We had a mishap with our caravan not long after arriving, we tried to book the last cabin only to be charged full price after paying for powered site, the room is dirty, the staff were rude and not at all accommodating to our predicament and will never be staying here again. Ridiculous!

A well run Big 4 caravan park, with all the amenities you can  hope for to make your holiday relaxing and enjoyable. It's only a few minutes out of town (Bendigo), yet has a very country feel. A great spot to stay if you're visiting Bendigo, and don't want a hotel experience.

We live local to this park (Bendigo), but booked a stay to test out new camper trailer. SO impressed with all aspects of our stay. Friendly and helpful staff and clean, well-maintained park with modern facilities. Lots to keep the kids busy. Our kids (aged 12 and 14) especially loved the pool and go-karts, but younger children would love the extensive playground area. Lovely, shady sites close to amenities and camp kitchen. Great for families - Already planning our next stay

We live local to this park, but booked 4 nights  to trial our new camper trailer. SO impressed with all aspects of our stay. Friendly and helpful staff, clean modern facilities, well maintained park with shady, well positioned sites. Our kids (aged 12 and 14) enjoyed all activities here, especially the pool and go-karts. Younger children are catered for too, with extensive  playground area. Already planning our next stay here. Thanks Marong Big 4

My two young daughters and I made a last minute decision to stay at Big 4 Marong.  We were welcomed straight in and offered a beautiful grassy powered site for our caravan.  The grounds were beautiul
, green and shady.  The facilities were top notch with a gorgeous pool, rec rooms with games, pool table and even a high tech virtual golf range.  The pool was beautiful, great playground for the kids, jumping pillow, mega chess set, the list is endless! The camp kitchen was well stocked with necessities, barbecues were clean and free, the toilets/showers and laundry were all well maintained clean and fresh.

I cannot rate Big 4 Marong highly enough, it had everything we needed and more.  We will most definitely be back.  Last but most definitely not least, the staff were absolutely amazing, so friendly and helpful and went out of their way to make our stay perfect.

Thanks so much Big4Marong, we will most definitely be back.
Loved the big glamping tent, perfect for a few days away for a family of four

Nice little Big 4, however further than I thought from Bendigo, but that is my mistake.
Pitch sizes are good and took our Big Rig easily, one way system with a big road made getting into the pitch simple.

Hired the expensive bell tent for one night and was unimpressed by it.  The exterior was dirty and torn.  Interior was clean. There is no room to prepare food - you have to use shared facilities in the park. The bed was sinking on one side and the two wooden outdoor chairs wickedly uncomfortable and splintered.  The shower was amazing. The park facilities are good however pool was on the small side in peak season.  Service was good and the ac was on before we arrived, making the tent temperature tolerable.
Location- it’s not in Bendigo, it’s a small town nearby. Facilities in the town are adequate.
Awesome little big4 Park been going for 7 years now always something for kids to do .
A perfect place to relax 😌
This is our annual destination and it never disappoints. The staff are amazing and the facilities are always immaculate. They are continually upgrading the park.
Great place! So many activities for the children.
Amazing place. Extremely friendly staff who went above and beyond! Our 3 boys had the best time and so did we! Great facilities and very clean. Honestly the best park we have stayed at.
A great spot for our caravan for our two night stay, great location and lovely clean well maintained park :)

Very pleasant stay.
The staff were super friendly.
Grounds were fabulous due to the large shady trees, lush green lawns and new sealed roads (no dust)
This place is kids’ heaven, so much thought gone into the playgrounds and activities. Something for everyone.
The placement of the cabins was good, not too close like other parks.
The new concrete slabs (which include a driveway for our vehicle and also the caravan) was a real bonus…..

One of the best parks we've seen along our travels. Simple but well planned outlay of cabins and caravan ,tent sites.|Most sites allow vans to stay hooked up which is excellent. Very clean amenities which includes the pool, spa, ExGolf , games room and small conference room. The staff were extremely friendly and helpful. Quick and easy checkin. The kids play area was tucked in one corner, with another play area near the pool. Well done to all the team, so comfy here we stayed a 4th night.  Thank you for a fab park 👌
We had a drive through caravan site for the night. Everything so well set up. Best drive through site we have had made packing up and moving onto the next destination so easy.
The kids loved playing on the playground, pool and jumping pillow, along with riding their own bike on the bike track and the bikes you can hire.
we had a great stay a Marong,Victoria.It ,was clean and tidy.quiet
Very tidy and clean heaps of stuff for kids

Great place to stay
With well manicured sites

What an amazing oasis just out of Bendigo.
Such a clean and well maintained park.

Accommodation options:
Drive through sites, concrete slab sites, grass sites, various cabins, 2 x 6 person glamping tents and 1 couples bell tent.

Amenities:
Immaculately clean bbq facilities in a number of areas, laundry, picnic tables, rec room, camp kitchen, table tennis, pool table, a dog wash and off lead area. Theres also a small kiosk at reception.

Fun stuff:
Pedal cars for hire, scooters to loan, jumping pillow, half basketball court, large zip line, pump track, climbing frame, playground with smaller flying fox/zip line and 2 slides, swing set, solar heated pool and spa

The park itself is so well maintained and tidy.

We stayed for 2 nights in a 6 person luxury glamping tent (G2) which was just amazing. Queen bed and 2 x 2 bunk beds with all linen provided (byo pool towels). This space was so clean, inviting and relaxing. It was well appointed with all the kod cons. Split system helped with the cool mornings. Our family of 4 including 2 boys (7&5) loved our stay and would definitely rebook again.

The Marong Family Hotel was great for a meal (walking distance) and a short drive to Bridgewater Bakery for amazing cakes and slices. There is a small iga at Maiden Gully for supplies - otherwise go into Bendigo for Woolies/Coles before arriving as once you get to the park, you won't want to leave again 😊

I stayed overnight with my 2 teenagers and our dog in a dog friendly cabin.  The staff were very friendly & the facilities were excellent.  I found I had a flat tyre late in the afternoon, and wanted to say a big thank you to Justin, who worked overtime to help me - he changed my car tyre and put the spare on, and was so kind about it, saying it was no problem.  With people like Justin around, I'm not surprised this holiday park gets rated so highly.

Great service great location to park up and head into Bendigo booked 3 nights stayed 6
Great clean well looked after park

Was a great stay, staff are so friendly nothing was an issue or too much. Cabins were clean and tidy and modern. Pool was cold but great and not over crowded. Will definitely be back. Marong hotel is close and had amazing food.

Taking 3 kids, 9 and under away on a trip by yourself is nerve wracking at the best of times but we had the best time with so much for the kids to do to keep them entertained!

From climbing to the top of the rope pyramid, to the jumping pillow and hours in the swimming pool they had the best time.

Clean and tidy accomodation with enough for what you need - fridge, stove, tv, beds, shower, indoor and outdoor table. Ticked all the boxes that we required.

The staff were so lovely and we would definitely recommend.

Amazing people at the park.  We arrived late and after hours without a booking after a very frustrating evening - we were answered with a smile and were welcomed to the park with no qualms at all.  The park is so clean, the park camp fire already burning, beautiful level drive through site and even air conditioned amenities block. Just incredible (unexpected) service fairly rare these days.  We will return for a longer stay sometime I'm sure

I haven't rated rooms as we stayed with our van.  Amazing people at the park.  We arrived late and after hours without a booking after a very frustrating evening - we were answered with a smile and were welcomed to the park with no qualms at all.  The park is so clean, the park camp fire already burning, beautiful level drive through site and even air conditioned amenities block. Just incredible (unexpected) service fairly rare these days.  We will return for a longer stay sometime I'm sure

Cleanest cabins in Australia. The housekeeping team here are amazing. We are frequent travelers both in Australia and abroad and have been blown away with the extremely high standards in this park.  Even the communal cooking areas are spotless at all times, even when relatively full of campers. Don’t know what they are doing, but keep up the excellent work. Will recommend this park to all my friends and family.
We stayed in our Caravan, great place.
Great park beautiful scenery amenities are great I will be back.

Wonderful caravan park and service. We stayed here with our young kids for 4 nights and everything was perfect. Cabin was great and well maintained. The park itself was great with playgrounds, trampoline and the games room which really suited our family. The entire park was well maintained and you can tell great care is taken.

The location is a little out of town but not too far. It's nice and quiet.

We will stay here again.

Great caravan park. We stay here regularly as it is a great place to stop a overnight to avoid peak hour traffic going through Melbourne.  Staff are very friendly and the drive through sites are very easy to access even for our 9 metre van.  Concrete slabs a real bonus
Great, clean, park, friendly staff, love parks with green grass & trees, great amenities,  safe
Lovely park

We stayed here on a power/water drive through site in our caravan for 7 days.  The experience was really good with very clean heated amenities, spaced sites, good service and in general a very well kept park.  We would highly recommend this park and would certainly come back here if we visit Bendigo again.

A beautiful park about 15 minutes outside Bendigo, lovely vistas with clean well maintained facilities. Very friendly and approachable staff who made us feel welcome and shared their knowledge of the local area. Although we don't have children the play area, pool and spa are great and would keep them entertained for ages. Highly recommend ae a place to stay when visiting or passing through Bendigo. 😀
Great place and location easy drive to Bendigo will stay again

Great spot to stay just out of Bendigo Victoria
Lovely customer service and a great clamping tent.

Great place to stay! We had a dog friendly cabin, it was great. Our dogs were safe, the cabin was clean and lovely, shower was hot and bed was comfortable. Staff were very helpful. Organised our after hours check in and everything went smoothly. It was so easy. We would recommend this park to anyone, especially anyone travelling with dogs.

The service was excellent .The Park kept in good communication with us as we ran late but our keys and all the info we needed were left in an after hours box. Room had plenty of blankets and pillows, bedding and bed very comfortable and clean. Everything we needed to cook was in rooms.The free wifi and smart TV’s are incredible . You can hook up and stream Netflix, Stan, YouTube any streaming services really. Big plus is we were able to have our dogs and there was a nice little veranda spot for them to go in and out of our cabin. Plus doggie bags to get rid of doggie waste at every corner. There were other dogs at the park however all were well under control.There was no loud barking or loud visitors . The atmosphere was friendly.and peaceful. Lovely people at the park and lovely people running the park. I’d certainly book and stay here again anytime. Wish we could of stayed longer.
It’s a lovely peaceful caravan park that caters for kids well. Pedal cars, zip line and playground a huge win for us. Spa was wonderful even in the middle of winter. Love this place.
Great park. Lovely staff. Dog friendly cabin was fantastic.
Best maintained park I’ve ever stayed at.

Booked a powered site for the night.  Very friendly helpful staff.  Really appreciated the heated toilet/shower block facilities. Everything clean and well maintained. Amazing meal at the Marong Family Hotel just up the road. Definitely coming back.
Nice friendly and clean park. Good kitchen, nice games area heated bathrooms dog friendly

amazingly clean facilities
very friendly staff
We caravanned and had our doggie with us. Very dog friendly
thank you for providing a warm & welcoming space

Loved the park, the kids enjoyed the things to do, the spa was really warm and nice on a cool day. The golf simulator was great and is highly recommended for golf lovers. Being dog friendly was the reason why we stayed here, 15 minutes to central Bendigo. Great place.

This is the 3nd time back to Marong Big4 and we loved it as much as the first time. The staff are just so friendly and always willing to help. The park is maintained so well and we love the location. The word about this great park musy be out as it was full again all weekend. Well done guys
Perfect for a getaway. The cabins are modern well equiped. Park is impeccably maintained and the staff are very warm and welcoming

Hi my husband & I had a lovely relaxing time at at marong holiday park in our caravan there was plenty to do.
And most of all loved having our fur baby with us. Will definitely go back to this park as it’s not far from our home 1 hour up the hwy it’s a good weekend away 😀😀
We absolutely loved our stay. There was so much for the kids to do and it was all nice a close with a small park. It is maintained so well. Will definitely be back
We loved our stay at your Park. It was very clean, had a lot of great facilities and is a very well maintained Park. We would definitely stay here again.
Very clean, warm amenities. Nice drive thru sites.
Wonderful place to stay we had the pet friendly deluxe cabin just perfect for the 2 of us made to feel so welcome great amenities throughly recommend thank you

This little gem deserves to win Park of the year again!!!

The team looking after this park is so welcoming and warm. We enjoyed every moment of our stay here.

The cleanliness is top notch too! We didn’t want to leave when it was time.

Definitely will be a place we will come back again.
